fun plan(workspace: String, repository: String, pullRequestNumber: Int?, issueNumber: Int?): JudgeVerdict {
    val repoInstructions = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/AGENTS.md")
    val contextReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val contextMaintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedRepoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerification = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val workflowContext = readGitHubWorkflowContext()
    val targetRefs = resolveReviewTarget(workflowContext, repository, pullRequestNumber, issueNumber)
    val issue = githubReadIssue(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.issueNumber)
    val issueComments = githubReadIssueComments(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.issueNumber)
    val pullRequest = githubReadPullRequest(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.pullRequestNumber)
    val pullRequestFiles = githubReadPullRequestFiles(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.pullRequestNumber)
    val pullRequestDiff = githubReadPullRequestDiff(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.pullRequestNumber)
    val pullRequestChecks = githubReadPullRequestChecks(repository = "SiRumCz/yuanrong-datasystem", number = targetRefs.pullRequestNumber)
    val candidateModules = identifyTouchedModules(pullRequestFiles, generatedRepoIndex)
    val moduleContext = readRelevantRepoContext(candidateModules)
    val sourceEvidence = readChangedSourceFiles(workspace, pullRequestFiles)
    val testEvidence = readChangedAndRelatedTests(workspace, pullRequestFiles, candidateModules)
    val issueRequirements = extractIssueRequirements(issue, issueComments)
    val specClaims = extractSpecClaims(pullRequest, pullRequestDiff, sourceEvidence, testEvidence)
    val behavioralCoverage = compareSpecToIssue(issueRequirements, specClaims)
    val infraRiskReview = assessInfrastructureRisks(behavioralCoverage, sourceEvidence, engineeringPrinciples, moduleContext)
    val testAdequacy = assessTestAdequacy(issueRequirements, testEvidence, pullRequestChecks)
    val selfCheck = applySelfVerification(selfVerification, behavioralCoverage, infraRiskReview, testAdequacy)
    val verdict = decidePassOrChanges(selfCheck)
    return verdict
}
